recent.statement: Flash flood warnings in Colorado will disrupt 15-20% of regional electricity grid capacity
recent.evidence: No signal shows flash flooding disrupting 15-20% of Colorado's grid capacity, an event that would certainly have been captured in the infrastructure or outage sections.

recent.statement: A Category 2 hurricane will make landfall in Florida within the next week
recent.evidence: No signal shows any Category 2 hurricane making landfall in Florida; the only nearby cyclone (BERTHA-26) was a tropical storm affecting zero population, far from Florida.

recent.statement: A major cyberattack will occur on a major US corporation within the next week.
recent.evidence: No admissible signal text shows a major cyberattack on a major US corporation occurred during the window.

recent.statement: A severe heatwave will affect major cities across Europe within the next week.
recent.evidence: No captured signal concerns this forecast, and a severe European heatwave affecting major cities would certainly have been captured within the closed window.

recent.statement: A Category 2 hurricane will make landfall in Louisiana within the next week.
recent.evidence: The only Louisiana-area cyclone, BERTHA-26, was a Tropical Storm with zero population affected by Category 1 or higher winds, far short of a Category 2 landfall.

recent.statement: Flash flood warnings in Utah and New Mexico will lead to localized infrastructure damage and evacuation orders
recent.evidence: No numbered signal provides text showing flash flood warnings causing infrastructure damage and evacuation orders in both Utah and New Mexico within the window.

recent.statement: Flash flood warnings in Utah will lead to localized flooding in Salt Lake City
recent.evidence: No admissible signal shows localized flooding occurred in Salt Lake City within the window, so the forecast is unconfirmed.

recent.statement: Kerch Strait ship transits will drop below 1/day due to intensified Ukrainian conflict proximity
recent.evidence: Kerch Strait shows 2 daily transits, which is not below the forecast threshold of 1/day.

recent.statement: A Category 2 hurricane will make landfall in Central America
recent.evidence: The listed cyclones (BERTHA, FAUSTO, ELIDA, NOUL) were all tropical storms outside Central America with zero Category 1+ impact, so no Category 2 hurricane landfall in Central America is shown.

recent.statement: Texas electricity demand will exceed 95 GWh/h due to extreme heat
recent.evidence: No admissible signal reports Texas electricity demand exceeding 95 GWh/h during the window, so the threshold event is not shown to have occurred.

recent.statement: Kerch Strait ship transits will drop below 1 per day due to intensified Ukrainian conflict activity
recent.evidence: Kerch Strait shows 2 daily transits, which is not below the forecast threshold of 1 per day.

recent.statement: A Category 1 hurricane will make landfall in Honduras within the next week.
recent.evidence: None of the tropical cyclone signals show a Category 1 hurricane landfall in Honduras, and no signal is located near Honduras with the required wind speeds.

self_calibration.note: Published headline probability is RAW conviction (unchanged); this is the honest companion. Calibration fixes overconfidence, not discrimination — see /calibration.
